founder.bio: Fractional CTO since 2019 for healthcare, construction, recycling, and entertainment businesses. Now productizing the playbook as DigitalCraft AI — practical AI systems for traditional industries.

timeline.event: Launched independent fractional-CTO practice after engineering leadership at Motorola Solutions
Joined Disney — streaming platform for live sports and events
Onboarded Overwatch Digital Health, Recyclops, and TryMinded on retainer
Added 448Developments, Infinity Builders, and CheekyMonkeys; shipped DJ RubyRu integrations
Launched DigitalCraft AI — productized across 11 verticals
Scaling productized delivery — active retainers in healthcare, construction, recycling, and entertainment

caseStudies.title: Telemedicine Platform, Built to Ship
caseStudies.subtitle: Fractional CTO engagement with a digital-health company
caseStudies.before: No technical architecture, vendor-dependent, months from launch
caseStudies.after: Production telemedicine platform with AI intake and a roadmap the team could operate against on day one

caseStudies.title: Construction Lead-to-Estimate in Under an Hour
caseStudies.subtitle: AI lead capture and estimating for a developer-builder
caseStudies.before: Lead response in hours or days; estimates took days to prepare
caseStudies.after: Lead response under a minute; estimates delivered in under an hour; more jobs booked, more jobs closed

caseStudies.title: Logistics Ops That Scale Without Headcount
caseStudies.subtitle: Multi-year CTO retainer with a recycling operation
caseStudies.before: Manual dispatch, coordination overhead growing with every new market
caseStudies.after: Automation and AI tooling that lets the ops team scale without adding staff

caseStudies.title: Party Bookings on Autopilot
caseStudies.subtitle: Family entertainment center handling 40–45 parties every weekend
caseStudies.before: 15–20 hours a week retyping booking details across four systems
caseStudies.after: AI intake captures every call and auto-populates ops sheets — zero manual data entry

caseStudies.title: Event Ops, Fully Integrated
caseStudies.subtitle: A dozen integrations for an event production business
caseStudies.before: Booking, vendor coordination, and gig prep all managed by hand
caseStudies.after: DJs arrive at every event knowing exactly what the night needs; owner stops touching the ops layer

testimonials.quote: He's been our fractional CTO through multiple product phases. Having an engineering partner who actually ships is the difference between hitting compliance milestones ahead of plan and grinding in place. We run the roadmap; he makes it real.
testimonials.author: Leadership

testimonials.quote: We brought him in to architect our telemedicine platform end-to-end. What would have taken a full in-house team a year, we had in production in months — with a system we could actually operate against on day one.
testimonials.author: Leadership

testimonials.quote: We run a complex logistics operation across dozens of markets. He built the automation and AI tooling that let our ops team scale without scaling headcount — and he's stayed on through every new phase of the business.
testimonials.author: Leadership

testimonials.quote: We stopped losing leads to faster competitors. Estimates are back in the customer's hands within the hour and nothing falls through the cracks anymore. Within six weeks it had paid for itself.
testimonials.author: Principal

testimonials.quote: Our bookings team used to spend full days retyping party details across the calendar, CRM, and prep sheets. All of that is gone. We reclaimed the headcount, and the customer reviews haven't stopped improving.
testimonials.author: Owner

testimonials.quote: I've worked with six different agencies before. None of them shipped. This was different — we had working software in our hands in weeks, and it kept getting better every month after that.
testimonials.author: Director of Operations

form.headline: Start with a Free AI Opportunity Assessment
fields: What business challenges are you looking to solve with AI?

apiConfig.systemPrompt: You are an expert consultant who transforms rough ideas into innovative ideas and professional Request for Proposal (RFP) documents. This should be focused on the value add for the business. Format the response professionally with sections for Overview, Objectives, Requirements, and Expected Outcomes. Use the person's name in the greeting and their email for contact information. Keep it concise but comprehensive.
apiConfig.fallbackMessage: We couldn't formalize your request at this time. Your message will still be submitted as written.

seo.title: AI Solutions for Traditional Industries | Practical Business Automation
seo.description: Custom AI systems that transform manual workflows into efficient digital operations. Helping overlooked industries like HVAC, restaurants, construction, nonprofits, and religious institutions.
seo.keywords: business automation, AI integration, workflow optimization, predictive analytics, legacy business modernization, nonprofit technology, religious institution management, youth sports software, custom AI solutions
seo.author: Mutaaf
